patterns_discovered.description: Documentation includes Windows/Linux/macOS specific paths and procedures
Memory and performance settings tiered by RAM availability (8GB/16GB/32GB+)
patterns_discovered.impact: Allows users to optimize for their specific hardware

patterns_discovered.description: Each major feature documented with 2-3 alternative access paths
examples: SDK Manager access via welcome screen, settings, or toolbar

patterns_discovered.description: Clear prerequisites listed before each major section with verification commands
Clear distinction between required and recommended components
patterns_discovered.benefit: Guides users on minimal vs comprehensive setups

patterns_discovered.description: Numbered sequential instructions with visual indicators (✅, ➤)

gotchas_discovered.description: Different platforms require different hardware acceleration setup (HAXM/Hypervisor Framework/KVM)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Emulator performance significantly degraded without proper acceleration

gotchas_discovered.description: System image architecture must match processor type (x86_64 for Intel/AMD, arm64-v8a for Apple Silicon)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Wrong selection causes incompatibility or severe performance issues

gotchas_discovered.description: Excessive VM memory allocation can exhaust system resources and degrade overall performance
gotchas_discovered.impact: System becomes unresponsive if memory settings too aggressive

gotchas_discovered.description: SDK downloads and AVD boots can take 10-30 minutes, especially on first setup
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unexpected delays in development environment setup

gotchas_discovered.description: ReservedCodeCacheSize must be adjusted for high-memory systems to avoid compilation issues
gotchas_discovered.impact: IDE may become slow or unresponsive without proper cache configuration

coverage: AVD creation with multiple device profiles
approach_outcome.usability: high - detailed steps with multiple access paths and alternatives

recommendations.suggestion: Add visual diagrams showing IDE layout with feature locations
Create dedicated section for common setup issues and solutions
Include performance benchmarking notes for different AVD configurations
recommendations.benefit: Helps users understand trade-offs between memory allocation and startup time

recommendations.suggestion: Add links to official Android developer documentation for reference
recommendations.benefit: Provides users path for deeper learning

recommendations.suggestion: Document update procedures for SDK components with version compatibility notes
recommendations.benefit: Ensures documentation remains relevant as SDK versions change
